feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Community
feed.subtitle: SAP Community Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: I need to add a field in FCC in receiver channel for csv along with the incoming array from Source
entry.content:
The problem is data from source has field and an array .SO when mapping to FCC in receiver channel for creating CSV,the one field mapped is coming only once but the array lines are coming multiple times

 

WH_NO|IBD|ITEM_NO|BATCH|SKU|QUANTITY|MFG_DATE|EXPIRY_DATE|STOR_TYPE|STOR_SEC|BIN|SUG
0390657434
|1||BNTFR100-Q0|900|10.11.2024|10.11.2027||||M
|2||BNTFR200-Q0|900|10.11.2024|10.11.2027||||M

I need below.0390657434 is not coming in array but outside array

WH_NO|IBD|ITEM_NO|BATCH|SKU|QUANTITY|MFG_DATE|EXPIRY_DATE|STOR_TYPE|STOR_SEC|BIN|SUG
|0390657434|1||BNTFR100-Q0|900|10.11.2024|10.11.2027||||M
|0390657434|2||BNTFR200-Q0|900|10.11.2024|10.11.2027||||M
|0390657434|3||BNTFR100-81|820|10.11.2024|10.11.2027||||M

entry.title: SAC Optimized Story - Export to Csv / Xlsx - Script Error
entry.content:
Hello,

I am working with an Optimized Story in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) where I have created a button with a script to export table data to a CSV/Xlsx file. When I attempt to export the table using the button in our current tenant, I receive the following error message:

However, when I try the exact same export in another tenant, it works without any issues. Both tenants are using import data. Does anyone know the possible reason for this discrepancy?

Thank you for your assistance.

entry.title: RAP Odata V4 APIs from S4HANA public cloud not visible in BAS
entry.content:
I have created a RAP Application in S4HANA Public cloud using ADT. I have expodes this application as an OData V4 UI service. The preview of the application works fine.

I created a BTP destination for the S4HANA Public Cloud dev system (client 080).
The destination properties have WebIDEEnabled = true and WebIDEUsage = odata_abap,dev_abap,odata_gen

In SAP Business Application Studio, when I create a Fiori List Report using Template and choose the S4HANA public cloud destination, I am unable to find my Odata V4 service.I can see only OData V2 services.

I could not find much hints in SAP community blogs except that in few blogs they have mentioned settings w.r.t /IWFND/CONFIG and other V4 service group nodes but then all of these are On Premise related.

Is there a restriction on the availability of OData V4 Service in BAS? Or am I missing any configuration.

entry.title: API Proxy Authentication
entry.content:
Hello,

I have created API Proxy with the API provider(On-Prem) and adding policies verifykey. Problem is that when i test API Proxy with the API key then it throws an error 401 Unathorized. Please see the below Screenshots.

entry.title: ERROR in MIGO, class type 001 instead of 023
entry.content:
Hello GURU's,

I face an issue in MIGO in my test system after an upgrade (EHP4 SP5 to EHP4 SP26) : 

I was used to enter batch caracteristics in MIGO using the button "classification"

And The screen below should appear : 

Unfortunatly till the Upgrade I can not save the caracteristics, and it seems because I have the value : 

Any help will be appreciate, I am lost... I did not find any differences in the customizing between both systems even in Batch Manu or Classification menu. 

Isabelle

entry.title: Modification of PO Field
entry.content:
Good day,

I am currently part of a Finance Transformation team, and my client is a company that has Purchase Orders that have more symbols than want we have as a maximum in SAP. Could you please let me know, how I can modify the Purchase Order field in SAP to have up to 20-25 characters?


Thank you in advance for your help,
Nikola Nikolov

entry.title: Meaningless "posted a topic/replied to topic", instead use "question", "discussion", "blog article"
entry.content:
I see in my Notification feed questions, discussions and blog posts which are all tagged "posted a new topic" or "replied to topic", and I need to look at the picture to know if it's a question, a blog post or even a discussion. It has taken me months to change my habit from going from the text to the picture, in fact I have to look at both parts, the kind of topic, and the topic title. Why not having the whole information in the text? Proposing to replace "topic" with either "question", "discussion" or "blog article".

Here, it's a question:

It's a blog post:

It's a discussion:

Surprisingly, "topic" is not used in "commented on blog article":

Thank you.

Sandra

entry.title: How to include Qty of material loss happens during Packing,Dispensing and sampling in process order?
entry.content:
Dear SAP members,

I'm new to SAP PP PI process, During process order execution, we identified a gap between actual process we following in factory and existing setup mapped in SAP. (S4 Hana 1909). Kindly share us your valuable inputs.

When we are performing Packing, Dispensing and Sampling of SFG materials we identified small amount of material loss. At present it is not mapped in SAP execution steps instead we following handwritten papers.

For example when we are performing sampling we need to consume 14grams of material but weight machine only accepts minimum 20grams weight. So we have to take 20grams material and return 6grams remaining quantity to inventory after testing. In SAP we are capturing the consumption of 20grams but how to map its respective return Quantity. Is there a way to capture this return quantity in MIGO transaction ?

Kindly share us your suggestions how to reconcile below losses during process order execution

#Packing loss

#Dispensing loss

#Sample Quantity

 

Thanks,

Harish

entry.title: How to test API proxy
entry.content:
Hello,

How do I test API proxy in the test section? What will be my basic authentication username and password? Is this an on-prem username or what?

Note :- Configured API Provider With On-prem

entry.title: API Provider With Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Hello,

At the time of creating API Provider with Cloud Integration when Save and clicking on test connection then it is showing an error. How to resolve the below issue.

entry.title: API Proxy 401 Unauthorized
entry.content:
Hello,

After successfully creating API Proxy with API Provider (On-Prem) at the time of test API Proxy, it shows 401 Unauthorised. Please suggest how to resolve it, and I also want to know what my basic authentication username and password will be. It should be on-prem username & password or what?.

entry.title: SAP PI Most messages are going into scheduled and few are processing success
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We have a schenario SOAP to SOAP.

Most of the messages are in scheduled mode and only few are processing successfully.

Even unable to get log in message log for scheduled messages.

The messages which are in scheduled mode they are not going into error and success after few hours also still they are in scheduled mode only.

around 35k messages are in schedule mode they are not going to error and not going to process and unable to see the message log and nothing is there to see after few hours from 35k few are processed and few got failed so finally 25 k messages are in scheduled and they are stuck.

Please suggest.

 

Thanks & Regards,

Dileep

entry.title: LSMW dosn't work for FIBPU(intermediary bank) for vendor with more than one bank key
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I'm on S4HANA Release 1809, I need to add intermediary bank for 200 vendors, and I'm using tcode FIBPU.

Whene recording the lsmw, these are the steps (see attached steps and error message) :

Step 1 : I enter the vendor number and execute.

Step 2 : The system display the different bank keys available for the entered vendor, I should select the concerned bank key : I set a filter on the bank key and double click on the good bank key.
Step 3 : I enter my sender bank criteria. 

The issue is that when executing the LSMW in foreground, it seems that it's not able to set the filter and remember correctly the selected value in the next screen : 

Error message : Error message 00344 : No batch input data for dypro SAP MSSY0 0120

Any idea on how to solve this please ? thank you!

Thank you for your help!

entry.title: I want to know the detailed step of how to direct live connect sac to sap universe?
entry.content: I have read all the related help and wiki pages, but nothing seems to work for me. I would like to know in detail how to connect SAC with SAP Universe using a direct live connection.

entry.title: SAP Blog in Awaiting Review
entry.content: How long it will take for moderators to approve the blog. My blog is in Awaiting Review for more than a week

entry.title: Can we use BTP Application URL as an API.
entry.content:
Hi, After deploying project in BTP CAPM.
We got one Application URL that URL, I want to use as an API.
Is it possible, If it is. Then please provide some Idea and Blog.

entry.title: CDS view required for Material Classification characteristics in Public Cloud environment
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am working in a public cloud environment and I need a standard CDS View to get the material classification characteristics.

I have found the CDS View for Material Class and Characteristics separately. But I don't have the link between them. Request you to kindly help with your expertise.

CDS View for Material Class - I_ClfnClassForKeyDate

CDS View for Material characteristics - I_ClfnCharacteristic.

I need the CDS view link for Material, Class, Characteristics, and characteristic names. Below is the sample screenshot of what I need.

Thank you in advance. Your inputs are highly appreciated.

entry.title: Mass Upload of Generic Materials, BOM, and Routing in SAP Fashion Vertical (FVB)
entry.content:
Hi, I am new to SAP Fashion Vertical Business (FVB) and looking for a solution to create Generic Materials in mass using any uploader (Transaction Code: MM41). Additionally, I need to create BOM and Routing for these materials. However, I haven't found any solution specifically for mass uploads in the Fashion Vertical module.

If anyone has experience or proper data related to Fashion Vertical, please share the process or related data  Your help would be highly appreciated.

Thank you! 

SAP Fashion Management

entry.title: PM notification and order
entry.content:
Hello, I have an issue related to PM. When I fill in a field on the IW21 screen, how can I ensure that this data automatically appears when I convert it to a work order in IW32? For example, if I enter something in the Items or Tasks (in IW21), I want these fields to automatically show up in the IW32 screen when the order is converted. Is there a standard solution or a way to achieve this using BADI or something? 

Thank you in advance

entry.title: EAM 9-phase maintenance process - configuration
entry.content:
Hello,

I'd like to configure the 9-phase maintenance process as described in the sap best practices, but can't really activate the full best-practice content on our system (we partially already use the document types, etc.). I've gotten to a point where the overall status profiles mentioned in various documentations PMSP1 and PMSP2 are needed to proceed, but can't find a single source which would list the full settings behind those status profiles as well as the sub-phases.

Could someone please provide the standard settings for those objects in a simple table form or direct me to a resource where they might already be available?

Thank you in advance!
Best regards,
Janusz Gren
